work_packets.title: Google Docs Projection Documentation Ingestion
work_packets.objective: Read and index all projection-related documentation in Google Docs/Drive to extract product claims, architecture decisions, and feature specifications.
work_packets.validation_plan: Cross-reference extracted claims against local code state. Flag any claim that contradicts codebase reality.
work_packets.rollback_no_mutation_rule: Read-only. No Google Docs will be modified. Extracted data stored locally only.

work_packets.title: GitHub Projection Repository Inspection
work_packets.objective: List all user/org repositories, inspect projection-related repos, compare branch state with local source.
work_packets.validation_plan: Compare remote main branches with local source. Count commits ahead/behind.
work_packets.rollback_no_mutation_rule: Read-only. No pushes, no PR creation, no branch changes.

work_packets.title: Windows Beast /dev Trinity Source Inspection
work_packets.objective: SSH to Windows Beast, map /dev directory structure, identify EOS/CreatorOS/LyfeOS app directories, capture package manifests and source tree layouts.
work_packets.validation_plan: Verify SSH connection works. Cross-check directory listing with operator-stated locations.
work_packets.rollback_no_mutation_rule: Read-only SSH. No files modified on Beast. No files copied to VPS without explicit approval.

work_packets.title: EOS /opt/OS/saas Partial Backend Mapping
work_packets.objective: Deep map the partial EOS backend: document every route handler, schema table, migration, and identify all gaps relative to a complete EOS product.
work_packets.validation_plan: Every route file, schema table, and migration accounted for. Gap count matches actual missing functionality.
work_packets.rollback_no_mutation_rule: Read-only analysis. No saas/ files modified.

work_packets.title: EOS Windows Source vs /opt/OS/saas Convergence Analysis
work_packets.objective: Compare EOS source on Windows Beast /dev with /opt/OS/saas. Generate diff report classifying each file as ahead/behind/divergent/identical.
work_packets.validation_plan: Diff report covers every file in both locations. Classification is verifiable.
work_packets.rollback_no_mutation_rule: Read-only comparison. No files copied, merged, or modified.
human_decisions_required: Which source is canonical if divergent
Whether to merge and in which direction

work_packets.title: CreatorOS Source Tree Mapping
work_packets.objective: Map complete CreatorOS source across all locations (VPS projections, Beast /dev, GitHub). Determine completeness and canonical location.
work_packets.validation_plan: All known CreatorOS locations accounted for. File counts match reality.

work_packets.title: LyfeOS Source Tree Mapping
work_packets.objective: Map complete LyfeOS source across all locations. Determine completeness and canonical location.
work_packets.validation_plan: All known LyfeOS locations accounted for.

work_packets.title: Shared Trinity Architecture Map
work_packets.objective: Identify shared infrastructure, components, patterns, and dependencies across the Trinity apps. Map what is shared vs projection-specific.
work_packets.validation_plan: Shared components list is verifiable against actual code. No false claims about sharing.
human_decisions_required: Whether to extract shared integration base

work_packets.title: Canonical Source Structure Recommendation
work_packets.objective: Produce a recommendation for canonical source locations, sync direction, and repository structure for all projections.
work_packets.validation_plan: Recommendation addresses all known divergences. Each divergence has a proposed resolution.
human_decisions_required: Approve or modify canonical source architecture
Approve sync direction for each divergence

work_packets.title: Phase 14.1 Implementation Readiness Gate
work_packets.objective: Verify all source inspections are complete, all divergences are classified, all canonicality decisions are made, and the system is ready for feature build.
work_packets.validation_plan: Every divergence has a resolution. Every source has a canonical classification. Readiness gate passes.
